title: Media Decision Record
description: The media stage's recorded decision, handed from the media seat to the packager (release-spec.md §9.2 media→packager; §8.5/§8.6). It captures the retrieval query, a reference to the candidate set that produced it, the chosen action (reuse / modify / generate), the chosen asset (for reuse/modify), and a reference to the cooldown evaluation that governed the choice (DD-14). Cooldown is enforced at retrieval, package validation, and the publish executor; this record makes the media decision auditable at the handoff. All asset references are $CONTENT_HOME-relative; absolute paths are forbidden. Structural contract only; instances are instance data and never ship in the repo.

content_id.description: Content identifier shared across artifacts for this item.

brand.description: Brand id the media is for.

query.description: The retrieval query that drove the decision (mirrors the retrieval-result query block).

candidates_ref.description: $CONTENT_HOME-relative reference to the retrieval result (schemas/artifacts/retrieval-result.schema.json) the candidates came from.

action.description: The chosen media action. reuse: publish an existing asset as-is; modify: crop/edit an owned asset before use; generate: create new media.

reason.description: Human-readable justification for the chosen action.

chosen_asset_id.description: Asset selected for reuse or modify. Absent for generate.

chosen_asset_ref.description: $CONTENT_HOME-relative path to the chosen (or, for modify, base) asset. Absent for generate.

output_ref.description: $CONTENT_HOME-relative path to the produced media (the modified or generated result). Absent until the media stage produces output.

cooldown_ref.description: Reference to the cooldown evaluation that governed this decision (DD-14; release-spec.md §8.6).

asset_id.description: Asset the cooldown was evaluated for.

eligible.description: Whether the asset cleared the hard cooldown floor at decision time.

cooldown_blocked.description: Whether reuse was blocked by cooldown at decision time.

override_applied.description: True when an explicit human-approved override allowed use inside the cooldown window.

skipped_candidates.description: Higher-ranked candidates that were skipped before the chosen one, with the skip reason.

reason.description: Why the candidate was not chosen.

decided_at.description: When the media decision was recorded.
